summary.note: System state is deeply polluted (see CORTEX_EVALUATION_2026-04-12.md). Most CLAUDE.md and docs/spec/ entries are placeholder stubs with empty bodies from failed summarizer runs; eval artifacts from earlier ingests were never removed by incremental re-ingest; session observations from the cortex-7y4 fix itself are competing for rank-1; and .tasks/cortex-phase1.task.json is a 100KB+ lexical magnet that was not in .cortexignore. Verdicts reflect what the retriever actually surfaced, not what the underlying corpus could theoretically support.
